{{Infobox group
| name = Kotai clan
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Kotai]] clan is a prominent and great clan within the [[Empire]], frequently appearing alongside the [[Naru clan]] as one of the most common names among [[sacred artists]]. Members of this clan are characterized by their gray skin and often utilize stone-based abilities, such as the massive stone elephants that bear their emblem or specialized limbs made from stone-[[madra]] [[Remnants]]. The clan holds significant responsibilities, including manning the defensive wall along the [[Trackless Sea]] to protect against ocean tribes and managing various duties such as patrolling borders, executing criminals, and returning runaways from the [[Stonedeep Mines]]. Notable figures include [[Kotai Shou]], a grizzled veteran and former sea captain with a stone-[[madra]] limb, and [[Kotai Taien]]. The clan's leadership includes an [[Underlord]] who possesses a stone gauntlet for a hand.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Kotai clan]] has not yet made a statement.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] fought with the [[Kotai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Kotai clan]] is a great clan.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Kotai clan]] is a major clan.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Kotai clan]] has massive stone elephants draped with their emblem.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
